command.neotab.player_only: This command can only be used by a player.
message.neotab.no_permission: You do not have permission to configure NeoTab.
screen.neotab.title: NeoTab Server Config
screen.neotab.top.title: Title Information
screen.neotab.top.title.tooltip: Set the top title text shown in the tab header. Maximum length: 32 characters.
screen.neotab.top.content.tooltip: Set the top content text shown under the title. Maximum length: 64 characters.
screen.neotab.list.title: Title Feature
screen.neotab.list.title.tooltip: When enabled, displays a title before player names. Title text is provided by other mods and supports rich text tags (color and gradient). Currently using simulated data for testing.
screen.neotab.list.better_ping.tooltip: When enabled, ping text changes color based on latency.
screen.neotab.list.online_duration.note: When enabled, player online duration is shown as 1h, 5h or 1d1h.
screen.neotab.footer.custom.tooltip: Set extra text shown in the tab footer. Maximum length: 64 characters.
